title: Dropped log queue entries write to local file; distillation reads union of Supabase + local
resolution: Three-part implementation: (1) pi_agent.py: added _save_dropped_log() — saves dropped log_turn entries (not evolution.log_interaction) to logs/dropped_turns.jsonl on queue overflow. _async_log now captures the dropped entry before discarding it and saves it. (2) memory/pipeline.py: distill_session() now calls _load_dropped_turns(session_id) after get_l1_thread() and merges any dropped rows deduped by turn_number. (3) memory/pipeline.py: _drain_dropped_turns() helper replays recovered entries back to Supabase and removes successfully-replayed lines from the file. verify.py PASS.
